mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM knowledge_bases
id IN
#{id}
1 = 0
ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_bases WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_bases WHERE file_hash = #{fileHash}
SELECT * FROM knowledge_bases ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM knowledge_bases WHERE category IS NOT NULL ORDER BY category
SELECT * FROM knowledge_bases WHERE category IS NULL ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC
SELECT * FROM knowledge_bases WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) OR LOWER(original_filename) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC
SELECT * FROM knowledge_bases ORDER BY file_size DESC
SELECT * FROM knowledge_bases ORDER BY access_count DESC
SELECT * FROM knowledge_bases ORDER BY question_count DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE knowledge_bases SET question_count = question_count + 1
id IN
#{id}
1 = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_bases WHERE vector_status = #{vectorStatus}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_bases ( file_hash, name, category, original_filename, file_size, content_type, storage_key, storage_url, uploaded_at, last_accessed_at, access_count, question_count, vector_status, vector_error, chunk_count ) VALUES ( #{entity.fileHash}, #{entity.name}, #{entity.category}, #{entity.originalFilename}, #{entity.fileSize}, #{entity.contentType}, #{entity.storageKey}, #{entity.storageUrl}, COALESCE(#{entity.uploadedAt}, NOW()), COALESCE(#{entity.lastAccessedAt}, NOW()), COALESCE(#{entity.accessCount}, 1), COALESCE(#{entity.questionCount}, 0), #{entity.vectorStatus}, #{entity.vectorError}, COALESCE(#{entity.chunkCount}, 0) )
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_bases SET file_hash = #{entity.fileHash}, name = #{entity.name}, category = #{entity.category}, original_filename = #{entity.originalFilename}, file_size = #{entity.fileSize}, content_type = #{entity.contentType}, storage_key = #{entity.storageKey}, storage_url = #{entity.storageUrl}, uploaded_at = #{entity.uploadedAt}, last_accessed_at = #{entity.lastAccessedAt}, access_count = #{entity.accessCount}, question_count = #{entity.questionCount}, vector_status = #{entity.vectorStatus}, vector_error = #{entity.vectorError}, chunk_count = #{entity.chunkCount} WHERE id = #{entity.id}
